description: Add self-ping keep-alive mechanism to prevent Render free tier from spinning down the container after inactivity. A background thread pings /api/health every 5 minutes.
steps: Add a _keep_alive function in app/__init__.py lifespan that runs in a daemon thread, pinging http://localhost:{PORT}/api/health every 5 minutes.
Only start the keep-alive thread in production (when RENDER or PORT env var is set).
Ensure os, threading, time, and urllib.request are imported.
acceptance_criteria: Background keep-alive thread starts when RENDER or PORT env var is set
Thread is a daemon thread so it doesn't block shutdown
Exceptions in the ping are silently caught
findings: Self-ping keep-alive thread added to app/__init__.py. Runs only when RENDER or PORT env var is set. All 37 tests pass. Thread is daemon so it won't block shutdown.
